@sigil v0 hybrid
G: refactor(loadUser)
C: async‚àßawait‚àßnext(err)‚àßmissing_id_before_db‚àßnot_found_before_audit‚àßdb_err->next(err)
P: missing_id‚Üídb ‚àß findUser‚Üínot_found‚Üíaudit ‚àß log‚Üícache ‚àß set
V: async_await‚àßminimal_change
R: !audit ‚àß log_before_not_found‚àß!db ‚àß findUser_before_missing_id
A: minimal_async_await

[AUDIT]
Goal: refactor(loadUser).
Constraints: async and await and next(err) and missing id check before database call and not found check before audit and db_err then next(err).
Plan: missing_id then db and findUser then not_found then audit and log then cache and set.
Verify: async/await and minimal_change.
Risk: high-risk audit and log_before_not_found and high-risk db and findUser_before_missing_id.
Answer target: minimal async/await migration.

@sigil v0 hybrid

V: same_order‚àßone_next(err)‚àßasync_await‚àßminimal_async_await

[AUDIT]
Goal: reconcileBatch(...).
Constraints: load_batch and db and fetchRows and apply_rules and db and save and emit_metrics.
Plan: async then await.
Verify: same validation order and one_next(err) and async/await and minimal async/await migration.
Risk: high-risk reorder and high-risk extra_changes.
Answer target: load_batch then db and fetchRows then apply_rules then db and save then emit_metrics then next(err).
